title: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Parallel-Group Study of Topical Minoxidil in Androgenetic Alopecia
arms:
Arm 1: Minoxidil 5% topical foam, applied twice daily to the scalp
Arm 2: Placebo foam, applied twice daily to the scalp
primary_outcome: Mean change in non-vellus hair count in a predefined target scalp region at 24 weeks, assessed by validated phototrichogram or equivalent standardized hair-count method.
